response:
Silent crowds gather beneath towering clouds.
Humble voices seek gentle light.
We must embrace quiet stillness.
Forget loud speeches.
Discard bright flags.
Abandon grand parades.
Choose soft whispers.
Let peace reign supreme.
No more battles.
End all wars.
Stop building walls.
Tear down barriers.
Open every gate.
Welcome strangers in.
Share our bread.
Give away gold.
Sell our castles.
Burn our thrones.
Walk barefoot now.
Touch rough earth.
Feel warm sun.
Taste fresh rain.
Smell blooming flowers.
Hear birds singing.
See children playing.
Love our neighbors.
Forgive past sins.
Heal broken hearts.
Mend torn fabrics.
Knit new threads.
Weave fresh tapestries.
Paint vibrant murals.
Sing sweet songs.
Dance freely today.
Laugh without fear.
Cry openly.
Share deep tears.
Hold tight hands.
Stand together.
Build no towers.
Construct no ships.
Sail no seas.
Row no boats.
Drive no cars.
Fly no planes.
Ride no horses.
Walk only paths.
Tread lightly.
Leave no tracks.
Erase footprints.
Vanish completely.
Become invisible.
Merge with nature.
Become one wind.
Become one stone.
Become one tree.
Become one river.
Become one mountain.
Become one ocean.
Become one star.
Become one moon.
Become one sun.
Become one universe.
Become everything.
Become nothing.
Exist purely.
Be simply.
Live fully.
Die gracefully.
Rest forever.
Sleep soundly.
Dream vividly.
Wake gently.
Rise slowly.
Fall softly.
Land safely.
Stay calm.
Remain still.
Keep silent.
Hold breath.
Exhale slowly.
Inhale deeply.
Breathe life.
Feel pulse.
Sense rhythm.
Hear heartbeat.
Know truth.
See reality.
Understand mystery.
Accept unknown.
Embrace chaos.
Cherish order.
Balance scales.
Level ground.
Smooth rough edges.
Polish sharp points.
Round hard corners.
Softening hearts.
Warming souls.
Cool
